description: You are an audio archivist at a historical society processing a newly digitized oral history tape from /home/ga/Audio/samples/oral_history_raw.wav. In Ardour, create a track named 'Oral History 1974' and import the audio. Remove the first 4.0 seconds of tape leader noise, move the trimmed region to the beginning of the timeline, and apply a 1.0-second fade-in. Insert an EQ or Filter plugin on the track to filter out tape rumble. Export the restored audio as a FLAC file named 'tape_0042_restored.flac' to /home/ga/Audio/archive_master/ and save the Ardour session.
